metadata.description: hypermnesic — the git-native memory layer. A skillset + auto-query hooks + the self-hosted tailnet MCP, so agents reach hypermnesic by default (and never gbrain).

plugins.name: hypermnesic
plugins.description: Memory for coding agents: hybrid search/recall, entity resolution, and a gated git-first write — over the self-hosted, OAuth2-authenticated tailnet MCP. Replaces gbrain as the single memory layer.
